description_long: This object is a realistic eggplant with a deep purple, glossy skin and a green stem and calyx at one end. The body is elongated and slightly bulbous, tapering gently toward the stem, with a smooth, shiny surface that reflects light. The calyx is medium-sized and lobed, wrapping partially around the top of the eggplant and displaying a natural, leafy texture. The skin appears firm and unblemished, with subtle color gradients from dark purple to lighter highlights. The opposite end of the stem is rounded and slightly flattened, typical of a fresh eggplant. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, ripe vegetable suitable for culinary use or as urban food waste.
description: A glossy, deep purple eggplant with a green, lobed calyx and smooth, shiny skin. The body is elongated and slightly bulbous, tapering at the stem.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the eggplant, highlighting its glossy purple skin and green stem.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the rounded, bulbous end and the central highlight of the shiny skin.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the elongated body and the green calyx at the top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the green calyx and the base of the stem, with the body mostly obscured.
